info.name: SuperCareer API
info.description:
Complete API documentation for the SuperCareer Django backend.

Base URL: http://localhost:8000

## Authentication
Most endpoints require JWT authentication. After login, use the `access` token in the Authorization header:
`Bearer <access_token>`

When the access token expires, use the `/api/token/refresh/` endpoint with your `refresh` token to get a new access token.

item.name: 🔐 Authentication
item.description: User registration, login, logout, and token management.

body.raw:
{
  "email": "user@example.com",
  "password": "securepassword123",
  "full_name": "John Doe",
  "role": "job_seeker",
  "skills": ["Python", "Django", "React"],
  "specialization": "Backend Development",
  "experience": "3 years",
  "bio": "Experienced backend developer",
  "education": "BSc Computer Science",
  "hourly_rate": 25.00
}

request.description:
Register a new user. Returns JWT tokens and user/profile data.

**Auth Required:** No

**Fields:**
- `email` (required): User's email
- `password` (required, min 8 chars): User's password
- `full_name` (optional): Will be split into first/last name
- `role` (optional, default: 'job_seeker'): User role
- `skills` (optional): Array of skill names
- `specialization`, `experience`, `bio`, `education`, `hourly_rate` (optional): Profile data

Login with email and password. Returns JWT tokens, user data, and profile.

**Auth Required:** No

**Note:** This request has a test script that automatically saves the `access_token` and `refresh_token` to collection variables for use in other requests.

Logout by blacklisting the refresh token.

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**Fields:**
- `refresh` (required): The refresh token to blacklist

Get a new access token using a valid refresh token.

**Auth Required:** No

**Note:** This request has a test script that automatically updates the `access_token` collection variable.

Login using a Google OAuth2 ID token. User must already be registered.

**Auth Required:** No

**Fields:**
- `id_token` (required): Google OAuth2 ID Token

Register a new user using Google OAuth2 ID token.

**Auth Required:** No

**Fields:**
- `id_token` (required): Google OAuth2 ID Token
- `role` (required): User role (e.g., 'job_seeker', 'freelancer')

Change the current user's password.

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**Fields:**
- `old_password` (required)
- `new_password` (required)
- `confirm_password` (required): Must match new_password

item.name: 🔑 Password Reset (OTP)
item.description: 3-step password reset flow using OTP verification via email.

request.description:
Initiate password reset by sending a 4-digit OTP to the user's email.

**Auth Required:** No

**Fields:**
- `email` (required): Registered email address

Verify the OTP code sent to the user's email.

**Auth Required:** No

**Fields:**
- `email` (required): Same email used in forgot-password
- `otp` (required): 4-digit OTP code

Reset the password after OTP has been verified.

**Auth Required:** No

**Fields:**
- `email` (required)
- `otp` (required): The verified OTP
- `new_password` (required): The new password

item.name: 👤 Profile
item.description: View and update user profile information.

request.description:
Get the current authenticated user's profile.

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**Response includes:** bio, specialization, experience, skills, hourly_rate, education, preferences, first_name, last_name, email

body.raw:
{
  "first_name": "John",
  "last_name": "Doe",
  "bio": "Senior Backend Developer with 5+ years experience",
  "specialization": "Full Stack Development",
  "experience": "5 years",
  "skills": ["Python", "Django", "React", "PostgreSQL"],
  "hourly_rate": 35.00,
  "education": "MSc Computer Science",
  "preferences": "Remote work preferred"
}

request.description:
Update the current user's profile. Uses PATCH, so only include fields you want to update.

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**Updatable Fields:**
- `first_name`, `last_name`, `email`
- `bio`, `specialization`, `experience`
- `skills` (array of skill name strings)
- `hourly_rate`, `education`, `preferences`

Get dashboard statistics for the authenticated user.

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**Response:**
- `matches_today`: Number of AI matches found today
- `active_proposals`: Number of proposals with 'sent' status
- `avg_match_score`: Average match score percentage
- `profile_views`: Number of profile views
- `user_name`: User's display name

item.name: 💼 Opportunities
item.description: Browse jobs, projects, and create proposals.

request.description:
Get a list of all available job opportunities.

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

Get a list of all freelance project opportunities (scraped from Mostaql).

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

Trigger a fresh scraping of Mostaql for new freelance projects and import them into the database.

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**Response:**
- `message`: Success/error message
- `imported_count`: Number of new projects imported

Create a new proposal for a job or project.

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**Fields:**
- `job` (optional): Job ID to apply to
- `project` (optional): Project ID to apply to
- `content` (required): Proposal text. Use `"AI_GEN"` to auto-generate content using AI.

**Note:** Provide either `job` or `project`, not both.

item.name: 🤖 AI Matching
item.description: AI-powered matching between user profile and available opportunities.

request.description:
Get AI-matched opportunities based on the user's profile (bio & skills). The system uses sentence-transformers to calculate similarity scores between the user profile and all available jobs/projects.

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**Response:** Array of match results sorted by match_score (highest first).

**Note:** This endpoint triggers a live recalculation of scores — it may take a few seconds.

Create/upload a new CV document.

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

Get a list of all proposals submitted by the authenticated user, ordered by newest first.

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

Get, update, or delete a specific proposal by its ID.

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

**Supported Methods:** GET, PUT, PATCH, DELETE

Replace `1` in the URL with the actual proposal ID.

Get all notifications for the authenticated user, ordered by newest first.

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

Mark a specific notification as read.

**Auth Required:** Yes (Bearer Token)

Replace `1` in the URL with the actual notification ID.

item.name: 🛠️ Administration (Admin Only)
item.description:
Admin-only endpoints for managing users, viewing stats, and monitoring scraping activity.

**Note:** All endpoints in this folder require the user to be a Django staff/admin user (IsAdminUser permission).

request.description:
Get global application statistics.

**Auth Required:** Yes (Admin Bearer Token)

**Response:**
- `total_users`: Total registered users
- `total_jobs`: Total job listings
- `total_projects`: Total freelance projects
- `active_users`: Users with active accounts
- `blocked_users`: Users who have been blocked

View logs from background scraping operations.

**Auth Required:** Yes (Admin Bearer Token)

View admin activity logs (actions taken by admins).

**Auth Required:** Yes (Admin Bearer Token)

Get a list of all registered users, ordered by newest first.

**Auth Required:** Yes (Admin Bearer Token)

Toggle the blocked/active status of a specific user.

**Auth Required:** Yes (Admin Bearer Token)

Replace `1` in the URL with the actual user ID.

**Response:**
- `status`: Confirmation message
- `is_active`: New active status of the user

Interactive Swagger UI documentation. Open this URL in your browser to explore the API visually.

**Auth Required:** No

Alternative API documentation using ReDoc format. Open in browser.

**Auth Required:** No

Raw OpenAPI 3.0 schema in YAML format. Can be imported into other API tools.

**Auth Required:** No
